posts.author: david_eshop (David OBrien)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
Is it currently possible, or would it be possible to automatically
a) take a snapshot of a workdoc
or
b) convert a workdoc to PDF
and email it to a specified email address(es) every week?
This would allow the workdocs to become like a status report, taking the dynamic elements from the boards etc.
Thanks
